news.headline: Cramer's lightning round: Buy Cava
news.summary: "Mad Money" host Jim Cramer rings the lightning round bell, which means he's giving his answers to callers' stock questions at rapid speed.

gamePlan: Bias into tomorrow: Bearish — favor puts / short delta.
Use QQQ $729.86 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: NVDA PUT — enter $9.22–$10.20, target $14.57+, stop $5.83.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Stocks closed lower with SPY -0.60% and QQQ -1.90%. Composite sentiment -45 (Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, market breadth (a/d), sector rotation. VIX at 15.28 (+0.55%). Environment read: favor puts / short delta. Leadership came from Financials; Technology lagged. Today's standouts: JPM +3.68%, META +1.13%. Laggards: AMD -7.30%, AVGO -4.37%. Carrying NVDA as the top idea into tomorrow (6.8/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
